text:
The curriculum prescribed pursuant to Section 11219 shall include, but is not limited to, the following:

(a) The rights and duties of a motorist as they pertain to pedestrians.

(b) The rights and duties of a pedestrian as they relate to traffic laws and traffic safety.

(c) Information that emphasizes respecting the right-of-way of others, particularly with respect to pedestrians, bicycle riders, and motorcycle riders.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 5. OCCUPATIONAL LICENSING AND BUSINESS REGULATIONS [11100 - 12217]
### Chapter 1.5. Traffic Violator Schools [11200 - 11223]
##### § 11219.3

The curriculum prescribed pursuant to Section 11219 shall include, but is not limited to, the following:

(a) The rights and duties of a motorist as they pertain to pedestrians.

(b) The rights and duties of a pedestrian as they relate to traffic laws and traffic safety.

(c) Information that emphasizes respecting the right-of-way of others, particularly with respect to pedestrians, bicycle riders, and motorcycle riders.

*(Amended by Stats. 2006, Ch. 898, Sec. 2. Effective January 1, 2007.)*
